name: Ainos, Inc.
summary: Ainos, Inc. is a Texas-incorporated dual-platform company advancing AI-based scent digitization technologies and immune therapeutics. Its core platform, AI Nose, integrates gas sensor arrays with proprietary smell language model (SLM) AI to digitize volatile organic compound signals into machine-readable Smell ID data for industrial and healthcare applications. The company also develops VELDONA, a low-dose oral interferon alpha formulation targeting rare, autoimmune, and infectious disease indications, and has commercialized VELDONA Pet supplements in Taiwan.

products.name: AI Nose
products.description: AI-powered scent digitization platform integrating gas sensor arrays with a smell language model (SLM) to digitize VOC signals into Smell ID data format for industrial and healthcare applications.

products.name: VELDONA
products.description: Low-dose oral interferon alpha formulation targeting rare, autoimmune, and infectious diseases including oral warts in HIV-seropositive patients, Sjögren's syndrome, and feline chronic gingivostomatitis.

products.name: VELDONA Pet
products.description: Commercialized companion animal health supplements launched in Taiwan based on the VELDONA low-dose oral interferon platform.

products.name: Point-of-Care Testing (POCT) Devices
products.description: POCT devices under development powered by AI Nose for healthcare applications including senior care, women's vaginal health, and selected STIs.

partnerships.partner_name: Leading semiconductor packaging and testing company (unnamed)
partnerships.description: Multi-year subscription agreement for AI Nose deployment within semiconductor manufacturing environments, secured in 2025.
Wholly owned subsidiary focused on advancing the SLM algorithm to support AI Nose platform development.
